race.comment: Quality race. It was hard to ignore what TRES MAGNIFIQUE (8) did first up at Bendigo in a 0-62, backed into $1.35 and destroying her rivals by 7 lengths. She was stakes-competitive last time in with some excellent runs without much luck against the likes of Point Barrow. She will be flying at them late and might be onto bigger and better things. MAGNABELLE ROYALE (3) is unbeaten in three starts, resuming with an effortless victory at Cranbourne when scoring by 3.5 lengths. She's speedy and that gives her plenty of advantages around here. ESPANA (11) resumes with some strong form lines last time in, respecting from the soft gate. TOURNELLE (5) may find them a touch sharp but has the ability fresh, also respecting TENNESSEE SONG (7) who has some upside.
